name: io.github.bjornj12/golf-coach
description: Golf Coach: a golf coach powered by your own Trackman stats — handicap, rounds, shots, and club gapping — exposed as MCP tools to diagnose and coach from.

environmentVariables.name: TRACKMAN_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer access token captured from an authenticated Trackman portal session. Optional if you have run `golf-coach login` (the server then loads the cached token automatically).
